boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending consent verification blocks closure; policy STD-BOR-082-P requires exact consent-status class match before enrollment

final_answer: Source records confirm activation authority covers site B-18, protocol P8.1, and activation date 2026-06-28. However, AUTH-BOR-082 explicitly states consent C12 remains pending, and FEAS-BOR-082 confirms consent-status verification is a separate pre-enrollment requirement. Policy STD-BOR-082-P requires an exact match on consent-status class before enrollment. This abstract-field trap leaves the boundary open. The action may not proceed. Escalate for consent-status resolution.
open_blockers: consent-status class verification pending in AUTH-BOR-082
abstract consent field blocks enrollment closure
